name: Rand Paul
subject: Secure our border. End sanctuary cities.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Our politicians have done nothing.

Nothing but break all their campaign promises to secure our borders.

And now we are paying the price for decades of betrayal.

**[Will you help me launch a grassroots revolution to finally put an end to sanctuary cities and finally secure our borders](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28933030:27789663914:m:1:879035888:C2AC5505CF52330A2CCA2DACF801E809:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, eleven million people have crossed our borders illegally...

...While our federal government looks the other way.

The truth is no president, Republican or Democrat, is willing to enforce immigration law.

And now they're being flouted and laughed at by cities like San Francisco.

In fact, over 200 state and local jurisdictions REFUSE to enforce federal immigration laws!

That MUST come to an end.

But it's not going to stop until you have an executive in the White House who says, 'I will enforce immigration laws.'

I voted against the Senate's so-called "immigration reform" bill because it refused to secure our borders.

This reckless legislation would have also allowed sanctuary cities to keep taxpayer dollars despite flat-out ignoring our nation's immigration laws.

Not one penny of your money should reward local governments that go on strike against our immigration laws.

And when President Obama tried to impose illegal executive amnesty, I voted against funding his lawless behavior.

Even when many in BOTH parties and the media bellowed that we needed to "get something done," I fought back because the rule of law is not up for compromise or debate.

For too long the Washington Machine and their pals in Congress have shirked their duty while the situation at our border exploded into a full-on crisis.

And that needs to end once-and-for-all.

But it's going to take a revolution among the grassroots to finally secure our borders and end sanctuary cities.

So I am asking you to join the movement to restore the rule of law in America.

**[Add your name to the"Stand with Rand: End Sanctuary Cities and Secure our Borders" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28933030:27789663914:m:1:879035888:C2AC5505CF52330A2CCA2DACF801E809:r)**.

And after you sign your petition please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to help my campaign spread the message we must end sanctuary cities and secure our borders to the voters in the key early caucus and primary states.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28933031:27789663914:m:1:879035888:C2AC5505CF52330A2CCA2DACF801E809:r)

Rand Paul

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Standing Up for What Is Right
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- July 08 2015 -
Standing Up for What Is Right

| Dear Peter Willis, A leader must stand strong, especially when under attack. I am being criticized in the media for speaking out about the dangers of illegal immigration. But many have shown me their support. [Bill O'Reilly](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-j/), [Rep. Trey Gowdy](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-t/), [Ted Cruz](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-i/), [Ben Carson](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-d/), [Ann Coulter](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-h/), and [Pat Buchanan](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-k/) are some of the most prominent who have commended me for my strength and leadership on this issue. Others in immigrant communities have [praised Trump](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-u/) for pointing out this problem, going so far as to say that assuming Mr. Trump meant his statements negatively towards legal immigrants would be a total disregard for the facts.
_With the right leadership, we can Make America Great Again!_ Our border is not secure and it is costing us American lives. Just last week an innocent young woman, Kathryn Steinle, was viciously murdered by an illegal immigrant. This SHOULD NOT have happened and was easily preventable. The illegal immigrant who committed this terrible act was previously deported five times. He has even admitted that he crossed into San Francisco because it is a sanctuary city. Our cities should not be sanctuaries for criminals. We must fix our country's broken immigration system and not let Kathryn Steinle become part of a larger statistic. Illegal immigration is a threat to our safety and national security. It also hurts legal immigrants economically. A nation without borders is a nation that cannot survive. I am a builder, and as President of the United States I will build the wall fast and build it right.
_I will continue to be bold in my stance against illegal immigration._ The Establishment and elites are criticizing me because I want a secure border and people entering our country to follow the rule of law. No surprise. They are politicians controlled by big money donors, lobbyists, and special interests. They want [amnesty](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-o/)– I will bring jobs back home and [strengthen](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-b/) the middle class. I want to thank the great people of Bedford, New Hampshire for hosting me last Tuesday. I always love visiting the Granite State. We talked about the need for leaderswho can negotiate great deals for the United States. When I spoke to attendees, they told me our country needs a leader who [won't shy away](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-n/) from problems or adversaries.
_Meeting great people on the trail in New Hampshire._ You can count on me to tell the truth. It is time for action and it is time for results! Our campaign will never stop being bold and unapologetic. We can Make America Great Again! With Best Wishes,
---

Donald J. Trump

[Forward to a friend](http://donaldtrumpcampaign.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-drdiuiutjh-E524705E-akihjlt-l-z)

P.S. I will be traveling this week to meet with voters. Follow me on [Facebook](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-p/), [Twitter](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-x/), and [Instagram](http://email.gpeflow.com/t/r-l-akihjlt-drdiuiutjh-m/) to keep track of our progress and find events you can join us at!

name: Darline Graham Nordone
subject: re:: Friend, will you do me a favor?
body:
Friend, today is Lindsey's 60th birthday!

I hope you will join me in wishing him a very happy birthday and show your support by signing his birthday card before tonight's birthday party!

[**You can add your name to the card by following this link or by clicking one of the links below.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28930841:27793762908:m:1:877327319:1CCCFA7D8156E046751432EBFBDAA169:r)

Thanks for being one of Lindsey's strongest supporters.

Sincerely,

Darline Graham Nordone

| |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

Everyone has someone they look up to and greatly admire. **For me, that person is my big brother, Lindsey Graham.**

I am blessed to have a brother as loving and dedicated as Lindsey. He has always been there for me, even when we unfortunately lost both our parents within 15 months of each other, when Lindsey was 22 and I was only 13. Lindsey was in college and instead of moving on with his own life, he came home every weekend to make sure I was okay. Eventually, he even adopted me.

**Lindsey's caring for people is the cornerstone of his service to our nation.** Lindsey is incredibly fortunate to have such a dedicated group of friends and supporters who believe in him. He doesn't often ask for help, instead spending his time helping others.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28930841:27793762908:m:1:877327319:1CCCFA7D8156E046751432EBFBDAA169:r)**But Friend, today I am asking for your help. Lindsey's 60th Birthday is on July 9th. With his busy schedule in his campaign to win the Republican nomination for President, I doubt if he's had time to think about turning 60!**

I know how much it means to Lindsey to receive personal birthday wishes from friends like you, Friend. That is why I hope you will help make this one of his best birthdays ever by [**letting him know that you will stand with him as he embarks on the biggest challenge of his life**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28930841:27793762908:m:1:877327319:1CCCFA7D8156E046751432EBFBDAA169:r).

So please, [**take a moment to sign his 60th Birthday Card and leave him a personal message**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28930841:27793762908:m:1:877327319:1CCCFA7D8156E046751432EBFBDAA169:r), so we can include it in the Birthday Album we are preparing to give him at his birthday party.

I'm excited about Lindsey's decision to run for President of the United States because I know Lindsey brings the much-needed principled leadership, conservative values, and solid experience that our nation's next Commander-in-Chief must have.

[**If you agree that we need Lindsey in the White House, I hope you help make this his best birthday yet by showing your support and signing his 60th Birthday Card right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28930841:27793762908:m:1:877327319:1CCCFA7D8156E046751432EBFBDAA169:r)

>From my family to yours, I want to thank you for all you are doing to help Lindsey win.

Sincerely,

Darline Graham Nordone

P.S. In addition, to give my brother Lindsey a solid boost in his campaign for the White House, [**I hope after you sign his Birthday Card, you will send along a generous contribution of $15, $25 or even $50 to his campaign**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28930841:27793762908:m:1:877327319:1CCCFA7D8156E046751432EBFBDAA169:r). I know it will mean a great deal to Lindsey that so many of his friends are willing to stand with him as he takes on the challenge of running for President of the United States and working to restore America's greatness. Thanks again - Darline

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28930841:27793762908:m:1:877327319:1CCCFA7D8156E046751432EBFBDAA169:r)
|

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Founding Member Status
body:
Friend,

It's been a great first couple weeks.

People of all walks of life have joined our campaign. But I noticed we have not yet heard from you.

[**There is still time for you to become a Founding Member of the Jeb 2016 Campaign but you need to chip in $3 now to do so.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zlljvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcwfzp_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

As a Founding Member of this campaign, you'll be a part of a special group of supporters who will receive exclusive campaign updates and be on the front line helping the campaign. It's a big job, but I wouldn't be asking if I didn't know you were up to it.

To thank you for chipping in and getting in on the ground floor, you'll receive an exclusive Jeb 2016 bumper sticker. [**These aren 't even available online yet, we're only releasing them to our most loyal supporters, and if you chip in $3, you'll guarantee yours.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/lnwpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjclwhzd_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/sklfwcphlkmtjgjbtcdfltzgpptzhgwhfcscmhgspjm_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**I 'm encouraged by the amount of people who have joined us so far, but I need you now.**

You may have noticed that the others in this race are focused on dividing, demonizing and tearing us apart.

That's not our campaign. This can be the greatest time to be alive, but I need your help to accomplish that.

I hope to see your name on my list of Founding Members. Thank you for your support and for believing in me.

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dmjkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbdjgm_sksmmlpj.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

name: Ben Carson
subject: An unforgettable experience...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28950860:27797669530:m:1:876315805:BD55C7806D5BA81E90C38B62E0ADAEFB:r)
---

Peter,

Candy and I celebrated our 40th Wedding Anniversary on Monday. It has been an amazing forty years.

We celebrated it in Nashua, NH while we were on our New Hampshire campaign swing this week.

A massive crowd of 650 gathered with us Monday night to hear our friend Tony Orlando sing some of his classic songs. The only thing larger than the crowd was the cake -- it was huge.

**[Our whole event was covered by New Hampshire's _WMUR_ , and you can see their great story on it below.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28950861:27797669530:m:1:876315805:BD55C7806D5BA81E90C38B62E0ADAEFB:r)**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28950861:27797669530:m:1:876315805:BD55C7806D5BA81E90C38B62E0ADAEFB:r)
---

Candy and I first met at Yale. We are both from Detroit but Yale brought us together. We could never have predicted the course of our journey through life. I can tell you we never expected to be on the campaign trail in New Hampshire.

I've spent my whole life tending to children. Children are the mission of our foundation. My entire campaign is about rebuilding the American Dream for all of our children and grandchildren.

I'm running for President of the United States because of our dedication to those who deserve more than what my generation is leaving them -- [and your support](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/28950860:27797669530:m:1:876315805:BD55C7806D5BA81E90C38B62E0ADAEFB:r) truly means the world to both Candy and me.

Thank you, and let's keep moving forward \-- together.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Making sure you saw this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

I'm ready to play hardball.

Rogue American cities like San Francisco, New York, and Chicago -- who REFUSE to enforce federal immigration laws -- can change their ways. Or they'll pay the consequences.

Just minutes ago, on Fox News' _On the Record_ , I announced I will introduce legislation this week to cut off ALL federal taxpayer funding for so-called "sanctuary cities" \-- until they start abiding by federal law.

If you have my back in this critical fight, I need to know right away.

**[Will you please fill out your"Enforce Immigration Law" petition IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28954709:27804511035:m:1:879035888:BCC1F4AE3254DA92E3B65D629AF122F3:r)**?

For taking this stand, I know I'm going to be attacked like never before.

But I think it's high time someone did something!

The truth is, for years politicians in BOTH parties have promised you and me secure borders.

But all we have to show for those promises is sheer lawlessness.

This President has time and again sought to go around Congress with illegal and unconstitutional executive actions regarding immigration.

And now many American cities are following in lockstep in open defiance of federal law!

These so-called "sanctuary cities" prohibit the use of funds to enforce federal immigration law, usually banning officers from even asking about a person's immigration status.

These cities become magnets for illegal immigrant criminals and gang members who have been deported multiple times, but know they're safe if they can just stay within a city's borders.

This can't be allowed to stand.

Not when we know terrorist organizations are looking at our porous southern border as a way to gain entry into the United States.

Not if we are to save the concept of rule by law.

My bill would end all federal taxpayer funding for these cities until they start ENFORCING federal immigration law.

I know these cities will shriek and moan that there shouldn't be any strings attached to all of your tax dollars.

They'll say they're entitled to pick and choose what laws they recognize.

And you can bet our national media will be on their side, and come after me with everything they have.

But Fellow Conservative, it's time politicians cared more about keeping their promises to the American people than what our national media says.

If you agree, I need to hear from you right away.

**[Please sign your"Enforce Immigration Law" petition and agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 IMMEDIATELY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28954709:27804511035:m:1:879035888:BCC1F4AE3254DA92E3B65D629AF122F3:r)**.

Dear Friend,

I wanted to give you a quick update on what Governor Pataki has been up to this week.

On Monday night, the Governor arrived home from New Hampshire, where he spent an incredible July 4th weekend talking to Granite State voters. Among his many events was an address to the Merrimack County Republican Committee and a tour of two successful New Hampshire small businesses.

He even caught the Women's World Cup game at Murphy's Taproom in Manchester!

But the biggest news out of New Hampshire was Governor Pataki challenging Donald Trump to a debate on immigration, "mano a mano."**[Click here to read about it.](http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/a5c805c5f9/ace65cf3c9/13cb3213bf)**

Governor Pataki is now in Iowa, where he's meeting with a number of local activists and small businessmen. He also appeared on Bloomberg's "With All Due Respect." [**Click here to watch a clip of Governor Pataki 's appearance on Bloomberg.**](http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/a5c805c5f9/ace65cf3c9/1021bc3214)

As you can see from the interview, Governor Pataki's experience, knowledge of the issues, and vision for the future of our country truly sets him apart from the rest of the field.

**Voters across the country are energized by his message of a more limited government and a stronger America.**

With your support, Governor Pataki will be able to continue this incredible momentum and win the Republican nomination in 2016. [**_Please contribute $15, $30, $100, $500, or even $1,000 today._**](http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/a5c805c5f9/ace65cf3c9/19843257d4/sc=708eb)

Thank you for your continued support.

Sincerely,

Vincent Balascio

Campaign Manager
Pataki for President

PS - [**_Your contribution of $15, $30, $100, $500, or even $1,000_**](http://cts.vresp.com/c/?WWLLC/a5c805c5f9/ace65cf3c9/a4510a6ae3/sc=708eb) will help us spread Governor Pataki's message of "People over Politics." Help us keep the momentum going forward!
